creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

More details in caption!👇🏼

The Oxford Exchange is so much more than just a beautiful bookstore! There is also a restaurant that has afternoon tea, a coffee bar, a tea bar, a champagne bar and a home goods store with super high-end products.

Have you ever visited? 

Oxford Exchange
420 W Kennedy Blvd
Tampa, FL 33606
